privileged_info_summary: The source scene dwanko_run.tnz originates from the official OpenToonz samples repository and is placed at /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz. The output directory is correctly specified as /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/vertical_social. The target resolution is 1080x1920 (vertical aspect ratio), and the expected frame rate is 30 FPS. The animation requires rendering at least 30 frames with a total output size exceeding 200 KB. The source project file contains 72 frames and defaults to a 1920x1080 resolution.
